files_modified.purpose: Extend _apply_governance to also apply agents_seed.md to AGENTS.md per US-004-GOV
Package marker for integration test directory

commit_subject: test(T004): add integration tests and AGENTS.md governance support
commit_body: Extend _apply_governance to also write the DeviaTDD Orchestration Rules block to AGENTS.md using agents_seed.md (gap from US-004-GOV). Update test_full_init_cycle_completes to assert AGENTS.md exists with governance content. Add test_init_export_files_not_created_when_existing verifying pre-scaffolded config.toml/session.json are not overwritten. Add AGENTS.md assertions to test_init_idempotency_with_pre_existing_files. All 23 tests pass with lint and format clean.

validation.summary: 7/7 integration tests passed (1 added), ruff lint clean, format clean, 23/23 all-tests pass (447ms)

reasoning.approach: Fixed spec gap by adding AGENTS.md governance management in _apply_governance, then updated integration tests to assert AGENTS.md and added the missing test_init_export_files_not_created_when_existing test

key_decisions.decision: Extended _apply_governance to handle AGENTS.md alongside CLAUDE.md
key_decisions.rationale: US-004-GOV explicitly requires AGENTS.md to receive the same governance block treatment; this was a gap in T003's implementation

key_decisions.decision: Added test_init_export_files_not_created_when_existing separately from existing idempotency tests
key_decisions.rationale: Task spec explicitly requested this test; keeps focused on config/session idempotency separated from governance block behavior
prompts.log is not defined in spec.md or the current init implementation; asserting it would cause test failures with no corresponding feature
